title: Enable Hero section from sidebar and see it appear in live preview
description: Verifies that toggling the Hero section on in the sidebar immediately shows the Hero section in the preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Sections sidebar" is visible
Verify element "Live preview" is visible
Click on the "Hero" section toggle in the sidebar
Verify text "Hero" is visible in the live preview
Verify element "Hero section" is visible in the live preview

title: Disable a visible section and verify it is removed from the preview
description: Verifies that toggling an enabled section off hides it from the live preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the "About" section toggle in the sidebar to enable it if it is disabled
Verify element "About section" is visible in the live preview
Click on the "About" section toggle in the sidebar to disable it
Verify element "About section" is not visible in the live preview
Verify text "About" is not visible in the live preview

title: Rapidly toggle a section twice ends with correct final visibility state
description: Verifies that quickly toggling a section on and then off results in the section not being visible in the preview (no stuck state).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Sections sidebar" is visible
Click on the "Services" section toggle in the sidebar
Click on the "Services" section toggle in the sidebar
Verify element "Services section" is not visible in the live preview
Verify text "Services" is not visible in the live preview

title: Click a section in preview opens the content editor for that section
description: Verifies that clicking a section in the preview focuses/opens the corresponding content editor panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the "Hero" section toggle in the sidebar to enable it if it is disabled
Verify element "Hero section" is visible in the live preview
Click on the "Hero" section in the live preview
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Verify text "Hero" is visible in the content editor header

title: Edit a section title and description and see instant preview update after saving
description: Verifies a user can open the content editor for a section, edit text fields, save, and see the preview reflect the changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a section in the preview area
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Type "Updated Section Title" into the "Title" field
Type "Updated section description for testing." into the "Description" field
Click on "Save" in the editor
Verify text "Updated Section Title" is visible in the preview area
Verify text "Updated section description for testing." is visible in the preview area

title: Toggle a section setting and verify the visible preview changes after saving
description: Verifies toggle switches inside the content editor can be changed and the preview reflects the new state after save.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a section in the preview area
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Click the first visible toggle switch in the editor
Click on "Save" in the editor
Verify element "Content editor" is not visible
Verify element "Preview" is visible

title: Add a list item (skill/service/project) and verify it appears in the preview after saving
description: Verifies a user can add an item to a list-style section via the editor and see it rendered in the preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a list-style section in the preview area (for example Skills, Services, or Projects)
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Click on "Add" to add a new item in the editor
Type "Automation Added Item" into the new item name/title field
Click on "Save" in the editor
Verify text "Automation Added Item" is visible in the preview area

title: Remove a list item (skill/service/project) and verify it no longer appears in the preview after saving
description: Verifies a user can remove an existing item in a list-style section and the preview updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a list-style section in the preview area (for example Skills, Services, or Projects)
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Click on "Remove" for the first visible item in the list
Click on "Save" in the editor
Verify element "Content editor" is not visible
Verify element "Preview" is visible

title: Persist edited section content after a page reload (local storage persistence)
description: Verifies that saved edits persist after a reload, indicating local persistence is working.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a section in the preview area
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Type "Persisted Title" into the "Title" field
Click on "Save" in the editor
Verify text "Persisted Title" is visible in the preview area
Navigate to /
Verify text "Persisted Title" is visible in the preview area

title: Cancel/close the editor without saving and verify the preview does not reflect the unsaved changes
description: Verifies that closing the editor without saving does not apply changes to the preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a section in the preview area
Verify element "Content editor" is visible
Type "Unsaved Title Change" into the "Title" field
Click on "Close" (or "Cancel") in the editor
Verify element "Content editor" is not visible
Verify text "Unsaved Title Change" is not visible in the preview area

title: Apply theme color and toggle dark/light mode from the builder UI
description: Verifies that selecting a theme color and toggling dark/light mode updates the visible UI state in the builder.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Share & Export" is visible
Click on a theme color swatch
Verify text "Theme" is visible
Click on the dark/light mode toggle
Verify element "Share & Export" is visible

title: Attempt to import JSON and verify Import option is accessible (without file picker interaction)
description: Verifies that the Import JSON entry point is visible and opens the import flow UI without relying on native OS dialogs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on "Share & Export"
Verify text "Import JSON" is visible
Click on "Import JSON"
Verify text "Import" is visible
Verify text "JSON" is visible

title: Cancel/close the Share & Export menu without taking action
description: Verifies the Share & Export menu can be dismissed and returns the user to the builder UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on "Share & Export"
Verify text "Export" is visible
Press Escape
Verify element "Share & Export" is visible
Verify text "Export" is not visible

title: Undo then redo a single text edit updates the preview
description: Verifies a text change can be undone and redone via the UI buttons and the preview updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on a section toggle to enable a section (if not already enabled)
Click into a visible text field in the editor
Type "UndoRedo Test A" into the text field
Verify text "UndoRedo Test A" is visible in the preview pane
Click the "Undo" button
Verify text "UndoRedo Test A" is not visible in the preview pane
Click the "Redo" button
Verify text "UndoRedo Test A" is visible in the preview pane

title: Local persistence restores edited state after page reload
description: Verifies the builder state is saved to localStorage and restored after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click into a visible text field in the editor
Type "Persist Reload 1" into the text field
Verify text "Persist Reload 1" is visible in the preview pane
Reload the page
Verify text "Persist Reload 1" is visible in the preview pane

title: Multiple edits persist across reload and remain undoable
description: Verifies multiple changes persist after reload and undo can still revert the latest change.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click into a visible text field in the editor
Type "Persist Multi A" into the text field
Click into a different visible text field in the editor
Type "Persist Multi B" into the text field
Reload the page
Verify text "Persist Multi A" is visible in the preview pane
Verify text "Persist Multi B" is visible in the preview pane
Click the "Undo" button
Verify text "Persist Multi B" is not visible in the preview pane
